message:
refactor(mcp): extract utility functions to mcp_helpers.rs [ft-1fv0u]

Move ~450 lines of MCP helper functions (search config, policy,
reservation, IPC, workflow, audit, serialization) from mcp.rs to
mcp_helpers.rs. All items are pub(super) with `use super::*`.

mcp.rs: 3008 -> 2566 lines (total reduction from ~7000 to 2566)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
